case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES,INC., VS. CHRAIG METRE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES,INC. ON DEFENDANT METRE, CHRIAG AKA CHIRAG METRE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT METRE, CHRIAG AKA CHIRAG METRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 388 BEALE STREET, APARTMENT #1115, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
